title: Extend pack API model metadata fields

source.subject: added new metadata to api model

body:
Extends the pack/API metadata model with additional fields consumed by registry and docs tooling.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`39b911e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/39b911e)
- **Subject:** added new metadata to api model
- **Completed:** 2026-03-18

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Follow-up to **pack-command** for richer package descriptors.
